Exhibition Room

Large Panels

Large-scale decorative works where garden motifs are pushed into pure color and pattern — stylized leaves, blooms, and panoramic compositions built for wall-scale viewing.

Blue Leaves Panel
Nona Dronova · Oil on canvas

The Garden as Art

A digital archive of artistic heritage, dedicated to the philosophy of the garden, contemporary art, and the creation of a harmonious living space.
